global_summary: Company is behind: 29 of 174 tasks done, gap 18.6 points. Felton and Holmes are on pace, but Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack are badly stalled on appliances and cashflow-blocked brick. Push weekend crews to hit Week 1 targets before Sun Jul 12.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Fireplace and doors fixed, but only 1 of 21 expected work-days done; Slip: 95%. Next: install appliances to rescue Week 1.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Slip: 64% of the month plan (4.0 of 13.0 expected work-days done; 2/12 tasks). To recover: finish CLEANING: FINAL CLEANING by Sun Jul 12.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Slip: 12% of the month plan (15.0 of 23.0 expected work-days done; 3/29 tasks). To recover: finish KITCHEN : PLUMBING TRIM by Sat Jul 11.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: In-ground plumbing done, but foundation pour slipping; 11 of 16 expected work-days done, Slip: 15%. Complete in-ground electrical by Fri Jul 10.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: No Week 1 tasks closed yet; 10 of 21 expected work-days done, Slip: 23%. Install tiles and interior primer by Sat Jul 11.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Strong week, 7 of 8 tasks closed; 28 of 37 expected work-days done, Slip: 17%. Finish cabinet paint by Fri Jul 10.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slip: 14% of the month plan (52.0 of 66.0 expected work-days done; 6/23 tasks). To recover: finish PLUMBING ROUGH IN: EXECUTE by Fri Jul 10.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Exterior sheathing done, nearly on pace; 13 of 16 expected work-days done, Slip: 5%. Complete roof decking by Sat Jul 11.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Sheetrock hung and plumbing inspection passed; week fully on track, 9 of 11 expected work-days done, Slip: 5%.
